hero.headline: Identity Design Services
hero.supportingCopy: Premium identity design services for teams, schools, clubs, creators, and brands, including mascot logo design, athletic identity systems, school branding, lettermarks, apparel applications, and brand guidelines.

items.title: Identity Marks
items.shortDescription: Logos, monograms, wordmarks, and brandmarks designed with character, clarity, and long-term use in mind.
items.longDescription: Primary marks, secondary lockups, black-and-white versions, color versions, and export-ready assets for teams, schools, communities, and brands that need a distinctive identity mark built for real use.

items.title: Mascot & Character Identities
items.shortDescription: Character-driven marks for teams, creators, communities, and brands that need a stronger visual presence.
items.longDescription: Mascot logos, character marks, typography lockups, avatar versions, color systems, and apparel or social previews shaped for recognition at every scale.

items.title: Athletic & School Branding
items.shortDescription: Identity systems for teams, schools, clubs, academies, and athletic programs built for recognition, consistency, apparel, signage, and school spirit.
items.longDescription: Athletic branding and school branding systems that can include team marks, institutional marks, wordmarks, monograms, color direction, typography, apparel concepts, signage ideas, and rollout assets.

items.title: Brand Guidelines
items.shortDescription: Practical identity guides that keep logos, colors, typography, and applications consistent after delivery.
items.longDescription: Clear brand guidelines for logo usage, clearspace, incorrect usage, color codes, typography, file handling, apparel applications, and examples for teams, vendors, and collaborators.

processTeaser.headline: A clear process for identity work that needs to last.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: Translate the identity across real use cases.

steps.title: Deliver
steps.description: Prepare files and guidance for rollout.
